performance_overview: Through 25 sessions (inception 2026-06-01 through 2026-06-30) Bull has completed 7 trades: 3W/4L (43% win rate, avg +0.15%/trade). Cumulative: Bull -0.0612% vs SPY unavailable (persistent TLS error). All 7 trades closed same-day; zero overnight holds met criteria. Last 24 sessions have all been flat with zero entries — chronic ATR% compression across the current defensives/utilities universe is the root cause. Book is flat at $99,938.80.
best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — the ONLY consistently profitable bucket; enforce hard ceiling at RSI 60; n=2 (directionally clean but sample is small — keep enforcing until n>=10)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — all overbought chase entries have lost; hard ceiling, no exceptions
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — confirmed gap-up trap; skip entirely
Gap-up opens with RSI >60: zero qualifications across all 25 sessions; any name opening RSI >60 is a hard skip regardless of structural setup quality or conviction

Opening-bar RSI surge pattern: even premarket-clean RSI names (PANW 57, AMGN 58 premarket on June 29; D 58.2 premarket on June 30) surged well past the RSI 60 ceiling on the opening bar — the gap-up trap is systematic and persistent; do NOT chase within first 5-10 minutes of open even if RSI looked clean premarket

Current defensives/utilities universe (CFG, DTE, WEC, CNC, D, FRT, ED, NSC, KIM, AMGN, TFC): chronic ATR% compression 0.042-0.189% far below 0.30% floor; full universe refresh is highest-priority action before July 7 entry session
overnight_hold_insights: Zero overnight carries across all 25 sessions. The six-criteria gate (profitable + trailing-stop-active + above EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion) has never been met simultaneously. Policy is sound and conservative — no change warranted. DOWN SPY regime increases overnight gap-down risk further.
recent_market_context: June 30 ended flat — the 24th consecutive no-entry session and last trading day before the July 4 holiday break. SPY DOWN regime (EMA-9 737.95 < EMA-21 740.11). Broad morning sell-off: 10/11 universe names red on the day at open; only AMGN was briefly green (RSI=62.2, above hard 60 ceiling). All 11 universe names failed ATR% gate (0.042-0.189% vs 0.30% floor). Gap-up trap fired again (D: premarket RSI=58.2, intraday RSI hit 75.0; NSC premarket +1.23% reversed to RSI=35 at open). Equity $99,938.80 unchanged. SPY return unavailable (persistent TLS error).
notes_for_next_session:
FOR PREMARKET AGENT (next trading session, 8:30 AM ET) — EVENING SCAN COMPLETE 2026-06-30 (S&P500+NASDAQ100 universe, 516 tickers).

WATCHLIST PRODUCED: 13 candidates passed all 5 RS Leader + VCP filters, written to data/watchlist_evening.json. Funnel: 516 universe -> 514 with data -> 243 dropped on EMA alignment, 70 on RS, 167 on VCP, 8 on 52w-high proximity, 11 on vol dry-up -> 13 survivors.

TOP CONVICTION: MTB (RS=1.114, VCP=0.642 — genuinely tight/compressed, 0.6% from 52w high, vol_dry=0.854, closed within $0.05 of prior-day high $239.18 — clean level, not a spike). This is the strongest setup of the batch by a clear margin (score=20.64 vs next-best 16.84).

ALSO SOLID ON RS (>1.10): FITB (RS=1.140, VCP=0.781 — borderline, not deeply compressed), SJM (RS=1.140, VCP=0.724), AMGN (RS=1.122, VCP=0.824, but furthest from 52w high at 7.4% — weakest of this group).

CAUTION — OVERLAP WITH PREVIOUSLY-FLAGGED ATR-COMPRESSED NAMES: 7 of 13 candidates (DTE, CNC, ED, EIX, WEC, KIM, FRT) are utilities/REITs/managed-care names whose RS_20day only clears 1.05-1.10 (the loosened threshold), and these are the SAME tickers that failed the live entry ATR% gate (0.30% floor) for 24+ consecutive sessions per the prior summary. config.py still has RS_20DAY_MIN=1.05 (widened from 1.10) and HIGH_PROXIMITY_PCT unchanged — the prior session's recommendation to tighten these back was never applied (not changed tonight either, out of scope for the evening-scan routine). Expect DTE/CNC/ED/EIX/WEC/KIM/FRT to likely fail ATR% again at entry despite clearing tonight's RS/VCP screen — verify ATR% live before considering, and weight premarket review toward MTB, FITB, SJM, AMGN first.

No prior-day-high levels look like spikes — all candidates closed within ~1.4% of their prior-day high (several closed exactly at the high: FRT, ES), so the breakout trigger levels in watchlist_evening.json are clean.

RSI CEILING: Hard at RSI=60, no exceptions (carried over from prior sessions — gap-up trap confirmed repeatedly). GAP-UP TRAP PROTOCOL: wait 5-10 min after open before evaluating any name. SIGNAL BUCKET REMINDER: only RSI 55-60 at entry has a positive track record (2/2, +2.15% avg).
